payload.answer: I found one relevant saved item about AI memory: an AI memory article. I did not treat the Brain/Cognee chat, knowledge-graph open loop, family facts, Sam preferences, or the query table itself as saved AI-memory articles.

entity_resolution.reason: The query asks for recall of saved articles, not creation or modification of a durable memory entity.

payload.intent: Recall saved articles about AI memory.

details: Answered using only records relevant to saved articles about AI memory.
Excluded unrelated personal facts, preferences, chats, open loops, and the query table.
